answers.where: Hangar on a bright Roblox-like textured studs floor with the sourced Assault Walker centered.
answers.action: Inspect the mech on the textured world floor, then press Battle.
answers.response: The saved stylized-studs grass texture is now packed and rendered by a native mesh/material floor path instead of only recreated with shape-renderer layers.
answers.reward: The world surface now has a real reusable texture path for future biome/material polish.
answers.game_look: Textured studs floor, imported mech, toy-block props, readable engine-font HUD, saturated colors, and visible action button make this read as a casual Roblox-like mech game.

issues.text: World floor now renders through a real textured mesh/material path, but the first runtime texture is very bright and still needs material tuning, mips, and normal/roughness work.
